name: scope_caveat
value: Use this as a lightweight DronePropB inventory and representative C3 vibration ratio packet. It is not the full 111-file archive and should not be used as a complete classifier or absolute accelerometer calibration without channel/unit documentation.
note: Full Mendeley zip is about 0.5 GB; this script intentionally downloads only 12 representative files.
